name: Weevil
description: A slow, docile creature that wanders while searching for mushrooms. It is easy early-game food and also a useful pack pet once tamed.
specialTraits: It can be tamed with Mushroom Slurry. Once tamed it lowers thirst drain and acts as a 10-slot pack pet.
behavior: It lumbers around almost constantly while searching for mushrooms and mushroom bits. When it finds them it appears to eat them, although it never actually destroys the resource.
interactionWithPlayer: It is completely passive and only backs away when struck or startled. It can also be lured with mushrooms dropped by the player, including Mushroom Slurry and Toadstool Chunks.
interactionWithCreatures: Red, black, and fire worker ants actively hunt it, and lawn mites also harass it. Against all of them it only repeats the same clumsy flee response.
strategy: It is so defenseless that you can lure entire groups with dropped mushrooms and farm meat with almost no risk. Just make sure no ants are nearby if you want to tame one.

lootTransformations.description: If the creature is killed with spicy damage or a verified heat effect, compatible meat can become cooked meat.
If the creature is killed with salty damage, compatible meat can become jerky.
